abilities.name: Monster in the Dark
abilities.text: Reduce all damage dealt to this model from models with Fright tokens by 1.

abilities.name: Terrifying
abilities.text: Enemy attack actions that target this model suffer a (-) to their duel.

actions.name: Into the Dream Web
actions.costs_and_restrictions: If this action receives a raise, this model may place the target in base contact with a Shadow Lair marker within 6" of itself.

triggers.name: "AHHH, MY EYE!"
triggers.text: When resolving, deal +1 damage and move the target up to 3".

actions.name: Endless Nightmare
actions.costs_and_restrictions: This action cannot target the same model more than once per activation. This action may target allies or models with a Fright token.
actions.effects: Target declares an action, chosen and controlled by this model. Then, remove a Fright token from the target, if able.

triggers.name: Siphon Life
triggers.text: When resolving, this action deals +1 damage and this model heals 1.

triggers.name: Burrow Into Dreams
triggers.text: Make a Shadow Lair marker within 1" of the target.

actions.name: Nightmare Webbing
actions.effects: Make a Shadow Lair marker within range.

triggers.name: Homing Thread
triggers.text: An ally within 1" of this model may place into base contact with the made marker. If the placed model is a Bandersnatch, it may declare a (melee) action.
